title: Lokasoft
text: Home * Organizations * Lokasoft Lokasoft , a Dutch chess software developing and trading company directed by Lex Loep , established since 1992 [1] . In 2002 Lokasoft took over the activities of Schröder BV [2] . Contents 1 Products 2 Former Products 3 External Links 4 References Products [ edit ] [3] ChessPartner by Lex Loep [4] SmarThink by Sergei Markoff [5] Ktulu by Rahman Paidar [6] Chess Tiger by Christophe Théron [7] Rebel 12 by Ed Schröder [8] Former Products [ edit ] Deep Sjeng 1.0/1.5/1.6 by Gian-Carlo Pascutto Gandalf 6 by Steen Suurballe and Dan Wulff [9] Ruffian 2 by Perola Valfridsson External Links [ edit ] Lokasoft Home Lokasoft - Wikipedia.nl (Dutch) Home - Lokasoft - Home of ChessPartner Site Map - Lokasoft - Home of ChessPartner Products - Lokasoft - Home of ChessPartner References [ edit ] ↑ Lokasoft - Wikipedia.nl (Dutch) ↑ Company Information , by Ed Schröder and Lex Loep , September 1, 2002 ↑ Home - Lokasoft - Home of ChessPartner ↑ ChessPartner 6 ↑ SmarThink 1.20 (as of July 2020, no longer available) ↑ Ktulu (as of July 2020, no longer available) ↑ Chess Tiger 2007 (as of July 2020, no longer available) ↑ Rebel 12 (as of July 2020, no longer available) ↑ Gandalf 6 Up one Level
